intended_use: Air Next is intended to be used by: Healthcare professionals trained to perform spirometry tests on patients of age ≥ 5 years old, > 10 kg and ≥ 110 cm. Air Next is intended to perform basic lung func
intended_use_full: Air Next is intended to be used by: Healthcare professionals trained to perform spirometry tests on patients of age ≥ 5 years old, > 10 kg and ≥ 110 cm. Air Next is intended to perform basic lung function and spirometry testing. The actual diagnosis shall be done by a healthcare professional in hospital and clinical settings.
target_condition: Diseases affecting lung function including bronchial asthma, COPD, and cystic fibrosis
ground_truth: ATS/ERS 2005 guidelines and EN ISO 26782 standards for spirometer accuracy; B.T.P.S. (body temperature and pressure with saturated water vapor) conditions
other_metrics: Volume accuracy: ±3% of reading or ±0.050 L whichever is greater; Flow range: 0-15 L/s; Flow accuracy: ±5% or 200 mL/s; Flow resistance: <0.5 cmH2O/L/s; All safety standards passed (IEC 60601-1, IEC 60601-1-6, IEC 62366, IEC 60601-1-2); Meets ATS accuracy requirements
